title: You guys are AWESOME
author: Ewout
message: Hi mentors! I just want to thank you all for the amazing year, thanks to you guys my first year at uni was one of the best years of my life in all possible ways: socially, academically, and in personal growth. I've made many good friends during social events, and the CP, CO and CN exam preps have absolutely saved my grades for those courses. I also really enjoyed the go-karting/lasergaming, Efteling and escape room events, and not a single event disappointed. Love you guys, and keep up the awesomeness!
